name: Louann's Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Can Roma Tomatoes - undrained, chopped
15 oz Can Kidney Beans - drained and rinsed
1 1/2 tbsp Tomato Paste, or more to taste
2 medium Zucchini, cut into small pieces
1 Splash Tabasco Sauce - or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, saut the onion and garlic in the sherry until the onion is translucent. Add more sherry if needed.
2. Add everything else to the pot and bring it to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
